context:
WEYHRO RANSOMWARE
=================
📌5 Victims posted
📌A short summary of Data Breach Report which encompasses vital information of the leak; is also being prepared by the group on their DLS
📌All the files are organized in a user-friendly on a different Onion Domain
📌Targeted Sectors: Construction, IT, Finance, Real Estate, Manufacturing
📌Victims: 🇮🇹, 🇨🇦, 🇺🇸
💡Uses Next.js as React Framework on their DLS
💡The favicon used for their Cloud Storage is a template taken from Kubero.dev
